impact:
`analysis/captures/V2 V1200 BL1200 T1200 B1200 D1200 P1200 M1200 MS500 BS40 test_signal_48k_2.wav` is not trustworthy and MUST NOT be used to fit any constant. It is the only `_2` take in the 12-capture matrix (every other file is `_3`) — i.e. a leftover from an earlier render batch.

TWO INDEPENDENT PROOFS IT IS CORRUPT (both reproducible, no plugin involved):

1. IMPOSSIBLE HF ENERGY (analysis/iss008_rate_check.py). Raw 8-16 kHz energy re 100-1k:
     V2 BL=1.00 (0% dry):  -46.8 / -46.6 / -42.8 dB
     V2 BL=0.95 (5% dry):  -35.8   <- more HF than full-wet, correct
     V2 BL=0.90 (10% dry): -37.3   <- more HF than full-wet, correct
     V2 BL=0.50 (50% dry): -49.7   <- LESS HF than full-wet. IMPOSSIBLE.
   The dry tap is a bare wire (verified directly from schematics/crops/v2_TL_2x.png: U1B pin 7 runs
   down and straight into BLEND VR50.a — no cap, no resistor, no filter). Mixing in 50% of a
   full-bandwidth dry signal can only ADD HF energy. This file has less than its own full-wet
   siblings. The monotonic BLEND->HF trend is broken at exactly this one file and nowhere else.

2. WRONG ABSOLUTE LEVEL. With the dry/wet ratio now physically correct (kDryGain removed, ISS-008),
   every good V2 capture gain-matches to ~0 dB (BL1.00: +1.5/-0.2/+0.5; BL0.95: -0.6; BL0.90: +0.7)
   while this file needs +16.8 dB. NAM normalizes level per render batch, so a `_2` take carries a
   different normalization than the `_3` set.

WHY THIS MATTERS / THE DAMAGE IT ALREADY DID: kDryGain was fit to zero exactly this file's +16.8 dB
level error (commit cef46ff, "V2 BL=0.50 NULL +16.8 -> -0.1 dB"). That fit corrupted the dry/wet
ratio by +20.5 dB on V2 and broke the GOOD BL=0.90/0.95 captures (ISS-008). One bad capture fitted a
constant that damaged five good ones.

ALSO: this file is the sole evidence for ISS-008's headline "+54 dB @12.9k / pedal -63.3 dB" and for
the memory note "at partial blend the pedal's dry+wet phase-CANCEL in the top octave (BL0.50 rolls
~20 dB harder @14 kHz)". Both claims trace to this one corrupt file and should be treated as void.
The control that settles it: V1L BL=0.30 (70% dry, same bare-wire dry tap) reads only -9.1 dB @12.9k
— the pedal's dry path demonstrably passes HF essentially flat, exactly as the schematic predicts.

ACTION: quarantine it (the A/B harness should skip or hard-flag `_2` takes), and ask the user to
re-render this setting into the `_3` batch. Until then, treat V2 BLEND=0.50 as having NO capture.

Reproduce: python3.11 analysis/iss008_rate_check.py ; python3.11 analysis/iss008_dry_probe.py
location: analysis/captures/V2 V1200 BL1200 T1200 B1200 D1200 P1200 M1200 MS500 BS40 test_signal_48k_2.wav
resolution:
QUARANTINED 2026-07-16 (user request, so it cannot confound a future session).

Moved `V2 V1200 BL1200 T1200 B1200 D1200 P1200 M1200 MS500 BS40 test_signal_48k_2.wav` from
`analysis/captures/` to `analysis/captures-quarantine/`. NOT deleted — it is the user's capture data
and may be salvageable if re-rendered.

WHY THIS IS SUFFICIENT: noamp_captures.find_captures() globs `analysis/captures/*.wav` only, so a
file one directory over is invisible to EVERY consumer (ab_report.py, cascade_analysis.py,
comprehensive_report.py, every fit script). No code change or skip-list was needed — verified by
re-running analysis/iss008_rate_check.py, which now enumerates 11 captures with the BL=0.50 row gone.

KNOWLEDGE PRESERVED: the .wav files are gitignored (`*.wav`), so the file itself does not travel with
the repo and a bare move would have lost the reason. Added `analysis/captures-quarantine/README.md`
(tracked) carrying the full evidence: the impossible raw-HF-energy table (BL=0.50 at 50% dry holds
-49.7 dB, LESS than its own full-wet siblings' -42.8..-46.8, which a bare-wire dry tap makes
impossible), the +16.8 dB batch-normalization offset, the damage it did (kDryGain was fit to it, which
broke five good captures = ISS-008), the two now-void claims it spawned, the V1L BL=0.30 control that
settles it, and the un-quarantine criterion.

STANDING CONSEQUENCE: V2 BLEND=0.50 has NO capture. Nothing may be fitted to that setting until the
user re-renders it into the `_3` batch and its raw 8-16k energy reads ABOVE the full-wet captures'
(the physical check it currently fails).
title: V2 BLEND=0.50 capture (the matrix's only `_2` take) is CORRUPT — exclude it from fits
